title: Trait-based CLIF lowering architecture roadmap
body:
Authored a **trait-based lowering** design and node-by-node implementation roadmap for emitting **CLIF** from typed HIR—each HIR construct maps to a lowering trait implementation.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`7b35a52`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/7b35a52)
- **Subject:** trait-based lowering architecture and node-by-node implementation roadmap
- **Completed:** 2026-02-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-execution-jit-gc`

## Relation
Avoided a monolithic lowering match that would not scale as Pecan’s HIR grew (attributes, lambdas, interpolation desugar, etc.). Informed later AOT codegen and CI smoke tests; aligns with Beskid’s direction of shared lowering entry points for analyze/build/run.

source.subject: trait-based lowering architecture and node-by-node implementation roadmap
